headline: 2 Cash-Producing Stocks to Keep an Eye On and 1 We Find Risky
summary: While strong cash flow is a key indicator of stability, it doesn’t always translate to superior returns. Some cash-heavy businesses struggle with inefficient spending, slowing demand, or weak competitive positioning.

headline: Chipotle vs Wingstop: Which Fast-Casual Bet Paid Off More?
summary: Chipotle Mexican Grill (NYSE: CMG) and Wingstop (NASDAQ: WING) both built reputations on simple menus, loyal customers, and relentless unit growth. But their stock paths over the past decade look nothing alike. Two Fast-Casual Giants, Two Very Different Stories Chipotle spent years recovering from a catastrophic 2015 food safety crisis, then rebuilt around digital ordering, Chipotlane ... headline: Bear of the Day: Chipotle Mexican Grill (CMG)
